My Map Campaigns My Plan Contact Newsletter Contact Leave this field blank Westminster Office House of Commons, London SW1A 0AA 020 7219 7037 [email protected] On Facebook On Twitter The quickest way to contact Mel is by email ( [email protected] ). You can also complete the form below. Cases will be considered as soon as possible and taking account of the urgency of the matters raised. If you are writing to Mel as part of a campaign group where many people (sometimes hundreds) send him an identical or very similar letter or email, please check the 'campaign responses' tab on the left of this page. The time saved posting a single response online rather than sending out hundreds of letters or emails in reply is very significant and is spent addressing the considerable and often complex individual casework that Mel receives. First Name Last Name Postcode Address id Address 1 Email Mobile number Message I would like to be kept up-to-date by the Conservatives on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy . The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.
